reviews.comment:
Lleve miles de veces mi auto y siempre tenia arreglos muy caros, nunca me daban los repuestos ni sabian explicarme que tenia, hasta tenia que pagar por las pruebas,  cuando lo llevo a otro taller la averia no tenia NADA QUE VER con lo presupuestado por el aca. Una lastima que ensucien asi esta institicion de años con un servicio tan malo.

(Translated by Google)
I've taken my car to a garage thousands of times, and it always had to be repaired in a very expensive way. They never gave me the parts or knew how to explain what was wrong. I even had to pay for the tests. When I took it to another garage, the breakdown was nothing like the quoted price. It's a shame they've tarnished this institution for years with such poor service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnaTUyQUN3EAE
